creator: cb@lim.nl
text:
Installing the amavisd-new package with pkg_add fails because of missing dependencies. Here is the output (edited):

[...]
pkg_add: could not find package p5-Digest-1.14 !
pkg_add: pkg_add of dependency 'p5-Digest-MD5-2.36' failed!
[...]
pkg_add: could not find package p5-Authen-SASL-2.09 !
pkg_add: could not find package p5-Digest-1.14 !
pkg_add: could not find package p5-Digest-MD5-2.36 !
pkg_add: could not find package p5-Net-1.19,1 !
pkg_add: pkg_add of dependency 'p5-libwww-5.805' failed!
[...]
pkg_add: pkg_add of dependency 'p5-Mail-SpamAssassin-3.1.0_6' failed!
[...]

How-To-Repeat: # pkg_add -r amavisd-new
